utterance: is  ps 11752778  compatible with  wrs325sdhz ?
notes: norm_id robustness: spaces + lowercase + 'ps ' prefix still resolve to YES.

Routing bug fix: a bare part number (no other words) must route to PRODUCT, not order. router_intents intentionally ['order'] (the mis-classifying LLM) -> the deterministic pre-route corrects it to product + renders the card.
Second bare-identifier case (canonical PS) -> product. Override wins over the canned 'order'.

utterance: where's my order LILY-1001
notes: Contrast: a REAL order message (order-context cue + LILY- order number) still routes to order. The override has no PS to fire on, so the LLM decides -> order (no over-reach).
Follow-up: a bare part number arriving mid-conversation (after a part/model discussion) must stay product/compatibility, NEVER order. Override -> product.
